name: Better Call Saul Presents: Slippin' Jimmy
original_name: Better Call Saul Presents: Slippin' Jimmy
overview: The misadventures of a young Jimmy McGill and his childhood friends in Chicago, Illinois. Told in the style of classic 70s-era cartoons, each episode is an ode to a specific movie genre — from spaghetti westerns and Buster Keaton to The Exorcist.

trailers.title: Better Call Saul Presents Slippin' Jimmy Limited Series Teaser | Rotten Tomatoes TV
